instruction: Write a FreeMarker layout macro `pageLayout` accepting `title` and nested content. The macro renders html/head/body scaffolding, includes `partials/head-meta.ftl`, and places nested content inside main. Escape the title.
code:
<#-- Macro: pageLayout(title) with nested main content -->
<#macro pageLayout title>
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <#include "partials/head-meta.ftl">
  <title>${title?html}</title>
</head>
<body>
  <main>
    <#nested>
  </main>
</body>
</html>
</#macro>
